name: ic-mesh
description: Intelligence Club Mesh — distributed compute coordination layer

scripts.test:ci: timeout 30s node server.js & SERVER_PID=$!; sleep 2; node test.js; kill $SERVER_PID
scripts.test:watch: while true; do node test.js; echo 'Press Ctrl+C to stop, or any key to rerun...'; read -t 5; done
scripts.logs: tail -f data/mesh.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'No log file found'
